seo_title: Triomics Secures $22M to Bring Oncology-Specific AI to Cancer Centers
meta_description: Triomics nabs $22M investment to develop and deploy oncology-specific AI solutions for cancer centers, aiming to bring AI-powered treatments to patients with…
body_html:
Triomics has secured a $22 million investment in its Series B funding round, led by Battery Ventures. The funding will support the development and deployment of Triomics' oncology-specific artificial intelligence (AI) solutions to cancer centers. This investment aims to bring AI-powered treatments to patients with cancer.

Key Investment DetailsFunding amount: $22 millionLead investor: Battery VenturesRound: Series BAI Solutions for Cancer CentersFeatureDescriptionArtificial intelligenceTriomics' oncology-specific AI solutions will be used to develop personalized treatment plans for cancer patients.Data analysisThe AI solutions will analyze patient data to identify potential treatment options and monitor treatment outcomes.Collaboration with cancer centersTriomics will work closely with cancer centers to integrate the AI solutions into their existing treatment protocols.Impact on Cancer TreatmentTriomics' oncology-specific AI solutions have the potential to improve patient outcomes and reduce treatment costs by providing personalized treatment plans and monitoring treatment
